resources.string: The STI Open Scholarship (SOS) program gives full or partial scholarships to students who do well in school. It helps them and their families pay for senior high or college at any STI College campus in the country.

• Programs
– Full or partial tuition fee coverage.

• Eligibility
– Grade 10 completers and Grade 12 graduates from any DepEd-recognized school.

• Requirements
– Pass the STI Open Scholarship Exam.

• Application
– Register for free at https://openscholarship.sti.edu.

• Other Grants
○ STI Alumni Scholarship: Up to 50% tuition fee subsidy.
○ Pag-IBIG Loyalty Cardholder: 10% tuition fee subsidy.

• Scholarships are non-transferable and apply only to the campus where the exam was taken.
• Applicants must have no record of misconduct.
• Slots are limited.
